title: Casual Weather Chat
opening: Good morning! How are you finding the day so far? It's looking a bit mercurial out there, isn't it?

t1.prompt: Good morning! How are you finding the day so far? It's looking a bit mercurial out there, isn't it?
t1.promptTranslation: Good morning! How are you finding the day so far? It's looking a bit mercurial out there, isn't it?

t2_positive_mood.prompt: Splendid to hear! A buoyant spirit can certainly cut through the gloom of a day like this. Any grand plans that have you feeling so chipper, or just a generally sunny disposition?
t2_positive_mood.promptTranslation: Splendid to hear! A buoyant spirit can certainly cut through the gloom of a day like this. Any grand plans that have you feeling so chipper, or just a generally sunny disposition?

t2_negative_mood.prompt: Oh dear, I'm genuinely sorry to hear that. Is it perhaps this rather oppressive weather weighing you down, or something more substantial on your plate?
t2_negative_mood.promptTranslation: Oh dear, I'm genuinely sorry to hear that. Is it perhaps this rather oppressive weather weighing you down, or something more substantial on your plate?

t2_weather_focus.prompt: You've hit the nail on the head! It's been an absolute toss-up, hasn't it? One minute you're reaching for sunglasses, the next it feels like a storm's brewing. It makes planning anything a complete nightmare.
t2_weather_focus.promptTranslation: You've hit the nail on the head! It's been an absolute toss-up, hasn't it? One minute you're reaching for sunglasses, the next it feels like a storm's brewing. It makes planning anything a complete nightmare.

t3_conclude.prompt: Well, whatever the reason, I hope things take a turn for the better, both literally and figuratively. It was good catching up with you about the day's atmospheric drama!
t3_conclude.promptTranslation: Well, whatever the reason, I hope things take a turn for the better, both literally and figuratively. It was good catching up with you about the day's atmospheric drama!

t-repeat.prompt: Sorry, could you elaborate a little? I didn't quite catch that.
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Sorry, could you elaborate a little? I didn't quite catch that.

t-end.prompt: Alright, take care then, and try to make the most of whatever the weather throws at us! Farewell for now.
t-end.promptTranslation: Alright, take care then, and try to make the most of whatever the weather throws at us! Farewell for now.
